verdict_reason: referenceNumber threading through query-string and pagination builders is correct, but inserting it as a middle positional parameter makes buildPaginationLinks easy to mis-call

todos.issue: buildPaginationLinks gained referenceNumber as the SECOND positional parameter, silently demoting baseUrl from position 2 to 4 — any existing call passing a base URL now sets referenceNumber instead, with no type error and no runtime failure
todos.fix: Take a single options object (pagination, { referenceNumber, sort, baseUrl }) so callers cannot mis-order, or append referenceNumber last

todos.issue: buildPageResultsRangeLabel's destructuring order was changed (size moved ahead of page) with no behavioural effect, adding unrelated churn to a search PR
todos.fix: Revert the reorder to keep the diff scoped to the search feature
